prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: large purple metal cube
  - obj_1: large purple metal cylinder
  - obj_2: large blue rubber cylinder
  - obj_3: small blue metal cube
  - obj_4: small cyan rubber cube
  - obj_5: large brown metal cylinder
  - obj_6: large brown rubber cube

Questions:
[qrr_0061] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0062] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0063] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0064] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0065] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0066] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0067] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0068] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0069] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0070] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0071] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0072] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0073] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0074] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0075] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0076] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0077] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0078] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0079] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0080] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D distances between objects in each image. Let me carefully examine the positions of objects in each scene.

Looking at the images, I need to map the objects across the different views to understand their 3D positions.

From the multiple views, I can estimate relative 3D positions:

- obj_0: large purple metal cube (mid-left area)
- obj_1: large purple metal cylinder (center)
- obj_2: large blue rubber cylinder (center-front)
- obj_3: small blue metal cube (center)
- obj_4: small cyan rubber cube (far front)
- obj_5: large brown metal cylinder (right-back)
- obj_6: large brown rubber cube (back-left)

Let me estimate distances from the views:

obj_1-obj_2: purple cylinder to blue cylinder - moderate distance
obj_3-obj_6: blue cube to brown cube - moderate distance
obj_4-obj_5: cyan cube to brown cylinder - large distance
obj_4-obj_6: cyan cube to brown cube - large distance
obj_5-obj_6: brown cylinder to brown cube - moderate distance
obj_1-obj_3: purple cylinder to blue cube - small distance
obj_2-obj_4: blue cylinder to cyan cube - moderate distance
obj_2-obj_5: blue cylinder to brown cylinder - moderate distance
obj_2-obj_6: blue cylinder to brown cube - moderate distance
obj_1-obj_4: purple cylinder to cyan cube - large distance
obj_3-obj_5: blue cube to brown cylinder - moderate distance
obj_3-obj_4: blue cube to cyan cube - moderate distance
